questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a ResultSet object in JDBC?
questions.hint: A ResultSet object is used to store the results of a SQL query.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a ResultSet and a Statement object in JDBC.
questions.hint: A Statement object is used to execute SQL queries, whereas a ResultSet object is used to store the results of a query.

questions.question: Describe the three main methods to close a ResultSet object in JDBC.
questions.hint: The three main methods to close a ResultSet object are: close(), setStatement(null), and setBeforeFirst(false).
